constraints.coverage_assumption: Direct lineage means BERT's explicit citation of Vaswani et al. 2017 and the architectural components BERT inherits from it; not inference through intermediate papers.

entities: direct citation of Transformer by BERT
BERT's exact framing of the relationship
differences between full Transformer and BERT's encoder-only use
normalized_question: Trace and explain the direct technical lineage from "Attention Is All You Need" (2017) to "BERT" (2018), identifying the specific cited relationship and the technical elements (transformer architecture, self-attention, encoder reuse, pre-training objectives) that BERT inherits from the Transformer paper.

obligations.description: What is the technical meaning of BERT's citation of the Transformer paper? Identify which architectural components (multi-head self-attention, positional encoding, encoder stack, residual connections, layer norm, feed-forward sublayers) BERT reuses, and how BERT's architecture differs (bidirectional encoder-only vs. original encoder-decoder).

raw_question: Show the direct technical lineage from Attention Is All You Need to BERT and explain the cited relationship.
